author: AVINASH0052
name: 10L LeakyReLU2 MLP3x + EMA + Int6 QAT + LZMA9 + Sliding Eval
blurb: 10-layer GQA transformer with LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 MLP 3x (1536 hidden), Polyak EMA (decay=0.997), late-stage Int6 STE QAT (80% of training), LZMA preset=9 compression, sliding window eval (stride=256) on EMA weights. Muon optimizer + decoupled weight decay (0.04), U-Net skip connections, tied embeddings, logit softcap. All techniques are standard ML; no code copied from other submissions.
lineage: Based on openai/parameter-golf baseline train_gpt.py with original improvements
technique_summary: LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 activation + MLP 3x (1536) + EMA(0.997) + Int6 STE QAT + LZMA-9 + sliding window eval (stride=256) + Muon WD=0.04
